title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete UI
scenario: Account tab under General settings in Poly Studio Mobile app does not display delete icon below Log out button as per Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the General settings menu (gear icon).
Select the Account tab from the General settings options.
Scroll down to locate the Log out button.
Check for a delete icon displayed below the Log out button.
expected: The Account tab displays a delete icon below the Log out button, matching the Figma design specification.
